title: viola dehnhardtii subvar. cadevallii
intro: Viola dehnhardtii subvar. cadevallii, also known as Cadevalli's pansy or mountain pansy, is a flowering plant species in the viola genus, characterized by its delicate purple and yellow flowers. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Viola dehnhardtii subvar. cadevallii include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve symptoms associated with respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
